sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47720" key="qalameu/tria" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θᾰλᾰμ-εύτρια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νυμφεύτρια</foreign>, <sense id="n47720.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bridesmaid</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:3:41" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.41</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
